zh.Vadans, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-C: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o瓦丹斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Ferrette於大約1225年出生在艾歐洛時，她的父親Ulrich II de Ferrette27歲，母親Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne27歲。她於1243年與Henri de Vergy I結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1287年之前。

zh-hans.Vadans, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-C: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o瓦丹斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Ferrette于大约1225年出生在艾歐洛时，她的父亲Ulrich II de Ferrette27岁，母亲Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne27岁。她于1243年与Henri de Vergy I结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1287年之前。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Carlo, Dante, Domenic, Quinto, Alessandro, Attilio, Carmello, Caesar, Cosimo, Cosmo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Ferro  .

variants.name: Ferretiz
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico; Ferrétiz): probably an altered form of Italian Ferretti , influenced by the Spanish patronymic suffix -ez.

variants.name: Ferro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Angelo, Mario, Pasquale, Alberto, Antonino, Bernardo, Guido, Carmine, Concetta, Dino, Ottavio, Pietro, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Carlos, Ramon, Eduardo, Fermin, Sixto, Angel.

Italian, Spanish, Portuguese, and Maltese: from ferro ‘iron’ (from Latin ferrum), used as a nickname denoting someone who was strong or as a metonymic occupational name for someone who produced or worked iron.
Italian: from a medieval personal name, preserved in the modern pet form Ferruccio.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Ferrette was born about 1225, in Europe, her father, Ulrich II de Ferrette, was 27 and her mother, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, was 27. She married Henri de Vergy I in 1243. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died before 1287.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Ferrette est née environ 1225, à Europe, son père, Ulrich II de Ferrette, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henri de Vergy I en 1243. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée avant 1287.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Ferrette um 1225 in Europa geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ulrich II de Ferrette 27 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne 27. Sie hat 1243 Henri de Vergy I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb vor 1287.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Ferrette è nata il circa 1225 nel Europa, sua padre, Ulrich II de Ferrette, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Henri de Vergy I nel 1243. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1287.

ja.Til-Châtel, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France: フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルティル-チaテル
ja.Vadans, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-C: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンヴァダンス
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Ferretteが約1225年にヨーロッパで生まれた時，父Ulrich II de Ferretteは27歳，母Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogneは27歳であった。1243年にHenri de Vergy Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1287年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Ferrette(이)가 대략 1225년 우럽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ulrich II de Ferrette(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1243년 Henri de Vergy I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Ferrette nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Europa, seu pai, Ulrich II de Ferrette, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henri de Vergy I em 1243. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu antes 1287.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Ferrette родилась около 1225 г. в местности Европа, её отцу по имени Ulrich II de Ferrette было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henri de Vergy I в 1243 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла перед 1287 г.

sm.um 1225–BEF 1287: e tusa o le 1225–a'e le'I oo le 1287

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Ferrette nació aproximadamente 1225, en Europa, su papá, Ulrich II de Ferrette, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elisabeth de Chalons de Bourgogne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Henri de Vergy I en 1243. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1287.
